case_title: ROSHAN PATEL et al VS. LUIS MORAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,280.00 FILED BY PATEL, ROSHAN PATEL, HARISH AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, LUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-20-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, LUIS
